title: Calculate Batch
description: Run sandboxed Python for repetitive math, list processing, and other batch-style calculations. The program must assign a JSON-serializable `result`.

selection.summary: Run sandboxed Python for batch math and data-heavy calculation work.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the calculation needs loops, list processing, aggregation, or repeated formulas over larger inputs.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for simple one-off arithmetic that fits in the direct calculator tool.
